reference: Hi, I got married. It has been six years, and I am still not having a child. Please suggest to me, after my menstrual cycle, from which day we should start intercourse. For the last five years, I had one operation for a fibroid, which is now clear, but I am still not having a baby. I am thirty-eight years old, and my husband is forty-three years old. Please tell me the treatment; I am waiting for your answer.
text: I got married. It has been six years and I'm still not having a child. Please suggest to me what day we should start intercourse. For the last five years I had one operation for a fibroid, which is now clear, but I am still not having a baby. I am 38 years old and my husband is 43 years old. Please tell me the treatment. I am waiting for your answer.
